data.title: Mental health, on an upward trajectory
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in New York City, a trend is seen in the evolution of mental health care. While standard treatments may not always be effective, there is a lack of awareness among many about alternative options. Curated Mental Health, an outpatient clinic in NYC, is leading this shift. With an array of treatment options and approaches, they aim to provide solutions for those facing mental health challenges.

data.title: Alpha Vision Showcases AI Agent for Cannabis Security at NECANN 2026
data.description: Alpha Vision, a prominent Silicon Valley company specializing in AI-driven video analysis, has revealed its involvement in the 2026 New England Cannabis Convention (NECANN) and NECANN Cup. The event will take place in Boston, providing an opportunity for attendees to explore Alpha Vision's solutions at Booth #817.

data.title: Mitigation Resources of North America Acquires Land for a New Tennessee Mitigation Bank
data.description: A project recently acquired 958 acres in Wilson County, Tennessee by Mitigation Resources of North America® to provide mitigation credits for a 14-county area. The land is situated east of Nashville and this acquisition is considered a major expansion for the company.

data.title: Superstate and Invesco Expand Strategic Partnership
data.description: On April 13, 2026, a leading financial technology company called Superstate based in New York and Atlanta revealed further commitments in its Series B equity funding round. The additional closing included significant investments from various sources. Superstate is known for revolutionizing capital market infrastructure and this recent funding boost underscores the confidence investors have in the company's growth potential. The exact amount raised in this round was not disclosed, but it is expected to significantly strengthen Superstate's position in the market and support its ongoing expansion efforts.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. Provides Operations and Corporate Update
data.description: Thousand Oaks, California - Kolibri Global Energy Inc. (referred to as "Kolibri" or the Company) (TSX: KEI, NASDAQ: KGEI) is happy to share a progress report on its upcoming wells in the Tishomingo field in Oklahoma and the 2026 projection based on the current drilling program. The Company has expedited its schedule for drilling three 1.5-mile lateral wells, namely the Clifton Mac 11-14-1H, Clifton Mac 11-14-2H, and Clifton Mac.

data.title: Telix and Regeneron Announce Strategic Radiopharma Collaboration
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. to collaborate on the development and commercialization of advanced radiopharmaceutical treatments. Telix (ASX: TLX, NASDAQ: TLX) and Regeneron (NASDAQ: REGN) made the joint announcement in Melbourne, Australia, Indianapolis, and Tarrytown, N.Y. on April 13, 2026. This collaboration aims to bring innovative radiopharmaceutical therapies to the market, leveraging the expertise and resources of both companies for mutual benefit.

data.title: OshKosh B’gosh Partners with Basketball Star Tyrese Haliburton, the Ultimate “OshKosh Kid,” to Inspire the Next Generation
data.description: In Atlanta, OshKosh B’gosh, a renowned children’s brand synonymous with classic American style, has revealed a two-year collaboration with basketball All-Star and Oshkosh native Tyrese Haliburton. OshKosh B’gosh, which became part of the Carter’s brand family in 2005, is united in its mission to celebrate the magic of childhood and support those influencing the future. This partnership commemorates Haliburton's transition from being an "OshKosh kid" to achieving success in the sports industry.

data.title: Freudenberg announces the final result of its takeover offer to the shareholders of Nilfisk Holding
data.description: The information provided is not intended for distribution or release, whether directly or indirectly, in any jurisdiction where such distribution or release would be considered unlawful.

data.title: Prodalim Expands Solos Technology Platform in the United States with New California Operations
data.description: In Winter Garden, Florida, Prodalim, a renowned company in juice and specialty ingredients solutions, revealed the advancement of its Solos platform in the USA by commencing operations in a fresh establishment in Hopland, California. This move signifies a significant achievement in the global expansion of Solos, Prodalim’s distinctive aroma recovery and beverage innovation platform. The site's strategic location in one of the globe's major wine-producing areas solidifies Solos' presence in the industry.

data.title: Gistvox Declares War on Synthetic Noise With New Web Audio Studio
data.description: Gistvox has introduced a new web audio studio on April 13, 2026, in Washington. The voice-first platform now includes two-minute human-only audio posts and a feed that allows listeners to have control over their content, focusing on authentic interactions rather than algorithm-driven suggestions.
677 people, including 318 children, have been affected by an outbreak of intestinal infection in Russia's Murom, according to the acting minister of health of the region

data.title: TradFi Veterans Launch Tok-Edge With $15M Valuation, Targets $100M Crypto Fund
data.description: A digital assets financial services firm called Tok-Edge, established by experienced professionals from traditional finance and crypto markets, has recently revealed its existence and plans to launch an institutional crypto hedge fund. The fund aims to reach a first close at $100 million.

data.title: Regeneron and Telix Announce Strategic Radiopharma Collaboration
data.description: Regeneron and Telix have formed a partnership to collaborate on the development and commercialization of advanced radiopharmaceutical therapies. Under the agreement, both companies will share costs and profits equally in a 50/50 model. This collaboration aims to advance the next generation of radiopharmaceutical treatments, leveraging the expertise and resources of both companies. It represents a significant step towards bringing innovative therapies to market and addressing unmet medical needs in the field.

data.title: A.I.S. Resources engages Geo Data Solutions GDS Inc. to complete a high-resolution helicopter-borne magnetic survey to support exploration across its St. John Project
data.description: A company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, A.I.S. Resources Limited, has recently announced its partnership with Geo Data Solutions GDS Inc. They will conduct a high-resolution helicopter-borne magnetic survey over the Saint John Project in South Western New Brunswick. The company is listed on the TSX-V as AIS, OTC PINK as AISSF, and FRA as 5YH. This initiative showcases the company's commitment to advancing its projects and utilizing innovative technologies.

data.title: Nova Appoints New Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Anchorage, Alaska on April 13, 2026, Nova Minerals Limited (NASDAQ: NVA, ASX: NVA, FRA: QM3) has announced the appointment of Ms. Ashlie Thorburn as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO), effective from April 20, 2026.

data.title: EnviroGold Advances Critical Minerals Supply Opportunities Through Centralized Processing Hub Strategy
data.description: EnviroGold is implementing a centralized processing hub strategy to speed up the extraction of critical minerals from tailings in a cost-effective way. This approach aims to enhance efficiency and reduce capital investment. The company plans to process approximately [insert number] tonnes of tailings to recover valuable minerals. This initiative will bring innovation and sustainability to mineral recovery processes.

data.title: Montage Gold announces that African Gold securityholders have voted in favour of the proposed transaction
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 13, 2026, Montage Gold Corp. (TSX: MAU, OTCQX: MAUTF) revealed that the stakeholders and optionholders of African Gold Limited (ASX: A1G) have approved the schemes of arrangement for the proposed deal between Montage and African Gold.
